_comment: Copy to projects.json (./init.sh does this for you) and add your repos.
projects.json is gitignored, so your local layout stays private while the
name  - stable key; ledger rows reference it via --project
path  - relative to this file, or absolute
stack - free-form label, for the agent's benefit only
check - the ONE command that verifies the project; exit 0 = green
A fresh clone starts with an empty list on purpose: `make check` is green
